judgment.summary: A high-margin, high-return business with robust earnings growth and strong analyst backing.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS actual 4.60 vs estimate 4.41 (beat) and next earnings date 2026-07-30.
positives: Operating margin 60.8% and profit margin 45.9% indicate highly efficient operations.
Return on equity is exceptional at 232.1%.
Earnings growth of 21.2% shows strong momentum.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $16.15B provides significant cash generation.
Analyst consensus is a strong_buy with a mean target of $647.81.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 282.06 indicates high leverage.
Quick ratio of 0.56 suggests tight short-term liquidity.
Price/Book 65.10 reflects a very high valuation relative to book value.
